mapper.sql: id, func_type, summary, input_text, output_text, extra_data, create_time
mapper.select:
select
from t_func_history where func_type = #{funcType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.delete: delete from t_func_history where func_type = #{funcType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and id not in (select id from t_func_history where func_type = #{funcType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{maxCount,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.insert: insert into t_func_history (func_type, summary, input_text, output_text, extra_data, create_time) values (#{funcType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{summary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inputText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outputText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extraData,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
